text.title: Paid Ads Creative Library Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: no library needed yet; revisit at 3+ variants

branch.when: spend_monthly >= 2000 AND active_variants >= 3 AND owner_enforces_tags == false

conclusion.verdict: library will decay; require owner commitment first

branch.when: spend_monthly >= 2000 AND active_variants >= 3 AND owner_enforces_tags == true

conclusion.verdict: lock taxonomy; wire lineage + performance + deprecation; ship spec

example.trace: spend_monthly >= 2000 AND active_variants >= 3 AND owner_enforces_tags == true → conclusion ref="tag-taxonomy-fixed" verdict="lock taxonomy; wire lineage + performance + deprecation; ship spec"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
